title: RussellChai/Gentamicin_NGS: Code for 'RNAP stalling-derived genome instability underlies ribosomal antibiotic efficacy and resistance evolution'
author: RussellChai
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This project include codes and examples for NGS data processing in 3'-end-seq, RNA-seq and ChIP-seq data for studying gentamicin induced RNA polymerase stalling and DNA damage.
steps_raw: This project include codes and examples for NGS data processing in 3'-end-seq, RNA-seq and ChIP-seq data for studying gentamicin induced RNA polymerase stalling and DNA damage.
